name: io.github.stucchi/trello
title: Trello MCP Server
description: MCP server for the Trello REST API – manage boards, lists, cards, labels, checklists and more

environmentVariables.name: TRELLO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from Trello Power-Up admin (https://trello.com/power-ups/admin)

environmentVariables.name: TRELLO_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: User token generated for your Trello API key
